question: Can this eReader become a photo viewer? If so, how do I operate this feature?
content:
Yes. It has a Photo mode for viewing pictures. Use JPEG or BMP images.
1. Add photos by connecting the reader to a computer with the USB data cable and copying files to the removable disk. If using a Micro SD/SDHC card up to 16GB, power the reader off before inserting or removing the card, then turn it back on.
2. From the main menu, select Photo and press M to enter Photo mode. The front control layout shows the M/menu button, left/right navigation keys, Play/Pause button, and zoom in/out key used for photo viewing.<PIC>
3. Press the left/right navigation keys for the previous or next photo.
4. Press Play/Pause to rotate the photo counter-clockwise.
5. Use the zoom in/out key to zoom the photo.
Large files may take longer to load into the photo viewer and to rotate.
ret:
"Yes. It has a Photo mode for viewing pictures. Use JPEG or BMP images.
1. Add photos by connecting the reader to a computer with the USB data cable and copying files to the removable disk. If using a Micro SD/SDHC card up to 16GB, power the reader off before inserting or removing the card, then turn it back on.
2. From the main menu, select Photo and press M to enter Photo mode. The front control layout shows the M/menu button, left/right navigation keys, Play/Pause button, and zoom in/out key used for photo viewing.<PIC>
3. Press the left/right navigation keys for the previous or next photo.
4. Press Play/Pause to rotate the photo counter-clockwise.
5. Use the zoom in/out key to zoom the photo.
Large files may take longer to load into the photo viewer and to rotate.",["Manual13_0"]
notes: Grounded in the Color E-Reader Photo section and document-management instructions. One image is included because the answer references the physical controls used to operate Photo mode.
